label: Total Artemis Investment
contestNote: NASA has not published a comprehensive lifecycle cost estimate; OIG notes lack of full transparency

label: SLS Cost Per Launch
contestNote: NASA does not publish per-mission cost breakdowns; figure derived from program totals

label: Artemis II Mission Status
delta: Crew postflight press conference Apr 16 at JSC; Mobile Launcher 1 rolled to VAB Apr 16 for Artemis III stacking prep
deltaNote: 30-day Orion heat shield inspection ongoing at KSC — results will define Artemis IV 2028 landing timeline. Flyby Apr 6 set distance record (252,706 mi).

label: Human Deep Space Distance Record
source: NASA Artemis II Mission Data, Apr 6, 2026
delta: Surpassed Apollo 13 crewed record (248,655 mi) at 1:56 p.m. EDT Apr 6
deltaNote: Artemis II crew — farthest humans from Earth in history (Artemis I was uncrewed at 268,563 mi)

label: Artemis I Mission Duration
source: NASA Artemis I Post-Flight Report, Dec 2022

source: NASA SLS Program, verified Artemis I

label: First Crewed Lunar Landing Target
contestNote: GAO and OIG have repeatedly flagged schedule risk; Starship HLS readiness unconfirmed

contestNote: Exact number depends on propellant boiloff rates; orbital refueling not yet demonstrated ship-to-ship
